basic_details.job_title: ESIC Hospital C.B.Ganj Bareilly Full Time/Part Time Specialist Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: ESIC Hospital C.B.Ganj Bareilly has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 4 Full Time/Part Time Specialist Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on 15 July 2026 at the ESIC Hospital C.B.Ganj Bareilly office with original documents and self-attested copies.

application_fee.all_categories_fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Full Time Specialist: Maximum age limit is 69 years. Part Time Specialist: Maximum age limit is 69 years. Age relaxation for reserved categories will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS and PG Degree or equivalent with 3 years experience or PG diploma with 5 years Experience in respective specialty after PG.
qualification.details: MBBS and PG Degree or equivalent with 3 years experience in the respective specialty after PG. PG diploma with 5 years Experience in the respective specialty after PG.

salary_details.pay_scale: Full time: Rs. 1,23,485/- consolidated. Part time: Rs. 60,000/- per month for 16 hours/week + Rs. 15,000/- extra for emergency calls + Rs. 800/- per hour beyond 16 hours/week.
salary_details.details: Full Time Contractual Specialist: Rs. 1,23,485/- (Consolidated) Part Time Contractual Specialist: Rs 60,000/- per month (for 16 hours/week) Part Time Contractual Specialist (Additional): Rs 15,000/- extra payable for visiting charges in case of emergency call at the hospital. Part Time Contractual Specialist (Additional Hour): Rs 800/- per hour beyond 16 hours per week.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Hospital C.B.Ganj Bareilly Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
ESIC Hospital C.B.Ganj Bareilly Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Hospital C.B.Ganj Bareilly Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Hospital C.B.Ganj Bareilly Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Hospital Bareilly?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Specialist posts at ESIC Hospital C.B.Ganj Bareilly is scheduled for 15th July 2026. Candidates should report between 09:00 AM and 11:00 AM.

faq.question: Q2. What are the eligibility criteria for the Specialist posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree along with a PG Degree or equivalent with 3 years of experience, or a PG Diploma with 5 years of experience in the respective specialty after PG.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Full Time/Part Time Specialist positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for both Full Time and Part Time Specialist positions is 69 years. Age relaxation for reserved categories will be applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Specialist posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for Full Time/Part Time Specialist positions at ESIC Hospital C.B.Ganj Bareilly.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for a Full Time Specialist?
faq.answer: The salary for a Full Time Contractual Specialist is Rs. 1,23,485/- consolidated per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for a Part Time Specialist?
faq.answer: A Part Time Contractual Specialist will receive Rs. 60,000/- per month for 16 hours/week, with additional payments for emergency calls and hours exceeding 16 per week.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents and one set of Xerox copies of all original documents, along with two recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Full Time/Part Time Specialist posts will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the ESIC Hospital C.B.Ganj Bareilly located?
faq.answer: ESIC Hospital C.B.Ganj Bareilly is located in Bareilly, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 243502.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for these positions?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for any category of candidates applying for these posts.
